personal.name: Soham Shirke
personal.about: Passionate Computer Engineering student at TSEC with a strong focus on full-stack development. I love building applications and exploring new technologies. Constantly learning and pushing boundaries in the dev world.

projects.title: SourceMind
projects.description: Built a serverless, event-driven multimodal RAG and knowledge synthesis platform that ingests PDFs, YouTube videos, scraped web pages, and images for semantic querying. Implemented vector search using Voyage AI embeddings with pgvector and HNSW indexing, and generative synthesis of mindmaps, quizzes, and podcasts via the Vercel AI SDK.

projects.title: CodeCook
projects.description: Built a self-hosted, LeetCode-style competitive coding platform API supporting authentication, coding problems, playlists, leaderboards, and an admin panel. Implemented an async submission pipeline using BullMQ and Redis to queue code execution jobs offloaded to a remote Piston engine, with JWT auth, HTTP-only cookies, and auto-generated Scalar API docs.

projects.title: Google Doc Clone
projects.description: Built a Google Docs–style collaborative rich text editor in React with a dynamic, context-aware toolbar and clean, component-driven layout. Integrated Clerk for secure user sign-in, Liveblocks for real-time multi-user collaboration, and Zustand for centralized state management keeping the interface fast and responsive.

projects.title: URL Shortener API
projects.description: Built a URL Shortener API using Express.js, PostgreSQL, Redis, and Drizzle ORM, enabling fast redirection through Redis caching and reliable data persistence. Implemented JWT-based authentication with secure password hashing and full CRUD operations for URL management.

projects.title: Wanderlust
projects.description: Built a modern and responsive travel website using Next.js, Tailwind CSS, Aceternity UI, and shadcn/ui, featuring smooth animations, clean layouts, and an engaging, user-friendly experience.

achievements.title: TSEC CodeCell Coding Challenge
achievements.description: Ranked 3rd overall in a 10-week TSEC CodeCell coding challenge
